title: NoBreachOnMace
description: Blocks Breach enchantment from being applied to maces while allowing Breach books to exist.
body:
🔨 No Breach on Mace – Fair PvP for Everyone!
Tired of overpowered Breach + Mace combos ruining PvP?
This plugin keeps the fun in PvP by allowing Breach enchantments to exist in your world — but blocking them from being applied to maces.

✅ Features:

- Players can still trade, find, or loot Breach enchantment books.
- Prevents applying Breach to a mace via anvils or any method.
- Automatically removes Breach from any mace if it somehow bypasses the check.
- Works silently in the background — no annoying spam or lag.
- Compatible with Paper, Spigot, and most forks.

⚔ Why use this plugin?

- Keeps PvP balanced and fair.
- Stops players from abusing the Breach + Mace one-shot meta.
- No need to remove the enchantment entirely — players can still use it on other weapons.

📦 Perfect for:

- Survival Servers 🏕
- Factions ⚔
- SMPs 🌍

💡 Installation:
- Drop the .jar into your /plugins folder.
- Restart your server.
- Enjoy balanced PvP without the mace abuse!
